text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our outing, Winning Ticket and I return to
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Hayahide, I'm back! Let's go play futsal!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Say what? Why futsal all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Cause I saw some people playing it today, and it
got me all excited!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Experiencing new exciting things will make me
stronger! So let's get to futsalling!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But Ticket, do you even know the rules?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sure do! My dad told me about it before.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
He's a pro sports trainer, so he knows all kinds of
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a professional trainer? That's interesting.
What does he specialize in?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm not sure! But he's pretty awesome at
everything!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I'm not sure why I expected you to at least
know what your own father does...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Ticket's enthusiastic—and somewhat
forceful—invitations, she gathers players in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WOO! It's finally time to kickoff! Isn't futsal
great?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This is it! It sets my heart pounding in a different
way from racing! This is what I was looking for!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Different from racing? They're both sports, so
what's the difference exactly?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's easy! The difference is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That I get to be on the same team as you and
Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Normally, we'd be opponents in a race, right? So
when one of us wins, that means the others lose.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But in futsal, the three of us can win together!
Isn't that awesome?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Celebrating victory with my besties will be the
best thing ever! Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think I understand now. She has a point.
Wouldn't you agree, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: One point doesn't make a victory...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So what are our positions? We can't start until we
decide that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, indeed. It may not be a deciding factor in
whether we win or lose, but what position Ticket
plays will be a key component.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's get some advice from her trainer, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So many options! I wanna play the most exciting
position!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, where should I be? Huh, huh? What do
you think?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, striker! That's the player in front who gets to
shoot the ball!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Every point scored would make it more and more
exciting! Yeeeah, I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The referee whistles the start signal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm bringing the ball right in front of the
goal. Ticket, here! Come on, take the shot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taaake this! JUMPING... NO TRAP... WINNING
SHO—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: It's mine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! My ball!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Idiot! Don't just stand there talking—make the
shot!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, Ticket... Was that narration really
necessary?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Sniffle... Yeah, it's importaaant!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Saying the line right before you get the goal is
the most moving way to score!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, at least have a logical strategy. If
the ball gets stolen before you make the shot,
you'll never achieve victory.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Got it! Then next time... I'll get it for suuuure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once more, Winning Ticket aims for the goal.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
LET'S GO! JUMPIIING... NO TRAP... WINNING
SHO—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Everyone, slide tackle! Get her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You dumbass! You did the exact same thing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaagh! Even if everyone tries to tackle me...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine if I just persevere! Wraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket evades the onslaught of sliding
tackles.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She managed to dodge them all... And without a
strategy. What a feat.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll make it this time! JUMPIIING! NO TRAP!
WINNING SHOT!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That speed!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No one can stop it. Ticket's power is incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filled with the tremendous spirit of her special
attack, the ball flies like lightning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...far above the goal and into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! No WAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: After a great setup like that, you miss? Well, I guess you moved me to feel something, all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game was messy but exhilarating, and Ticket
learned how to deal with sliding tackles using
sheer guts.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, keeper! If I stop all the balls that come my
way, it'll definitely move the audience!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, with Ticket's core strength, that seems like
a suitable choice. Let's go with that formation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The game begins.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin, I'll pass to you. Get it to the goal!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll slip past the defense, and—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Move it, move it! Yeeeaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket?! Why's the keeper out on the field?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know... After seeing you play, I wanted to
shoot the ball so bad!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, Hayahide, that's it! Can I be a keeper
who also attacks?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, keepers have sometimes been known to take penalty kicks, but it's not exactly conventional...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of convention, Winning Ticket runs
around playing both defense and offense.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Haaah! Attack, then defend, then attack again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dances around the field like a brilliant
prodigy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, she's so fast I can barely see her...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, with that speed, crossing the field and
playing both positions is actually an option.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I can do it! I'm doing it! I can play both positions!
YEEAH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! Counter offense! Now, while their
keeper is away!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? A counter-what now?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: NOOOO! We totally lost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The opponent's clever strategy led to their
inevitable defeat... But at least Ticket gained
some impressive speed.
